---
name: Feature request
about: Propose an improvement to the website or its content
title: "feat: "
labels: ["enhancement"]

---

## Need

Describe the problem or user need.

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives or approaches already considered.

## Expected impact

Explain the value for visitors, contributors, or maintainers.

## Additional context

Links, mockups, screenshots, references, etc.
